text: The bet-explorer replaces binary won/lost with WON / PLACED / LOST settlement-type badges to distinguish EW place-only settlements.

locator.quote: ew-metadata-pipeline** plan must be implemented first

text: Bet-explorer redesign depends on the ew-metadata-pipeline plan: the API must return is_each_way, each_way_divisor, number_of_places, settlement_type, effective_place_odds per bet first.
